extortion.description: **🫠 Oops, ****pid.co.zw**** been hacked 🔥[+] The website ****www.pid.co.zw**** belongs to Plan Infrastructure Development in Zimbabwe. The company specializes in infrastructure development, including roads, housing, and public facilities. They work on projects like transforming the "Sakuba" area into a smart city by 2030.[+] ****pid.co.zw****Dragons 💟.**
